title: HOMESHOPA Plastic Food Storage Containers, 3 Pack (700ml, 1.2 & 2.2L) Rectangular Leakproof Airtight BPA-Free Reusable & Stackable Meal Prep Lunch Boxes, Microwave Freezer Dishwasher Safe
features: Elevate Your Kitchen: Keep your kitchen organised and your food fresh with our top-of-the-line plastic food storage containers. Designed for both functionality and style, our airtight containers offer the ultimate solution for your food storage essentials. Unleash freshness with a touch of style—your kitchen's perfect partner awaits!

Durable & Safe Materials: Crafted from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, our leakproof plastic containers are built to last. Enjoy peace of mind, knowing that your family's meals are stored in safe and non-toxic containers.

Freshness Preserved: Keep your ingredients fresher for longer! Our stackable meal prep containers with lids lock in flavour and maintain the freshness of your favourite foods, ensuring every meal is as delicious as the first time.

Space-Saving Solutions: These BPA-Free reusable storage containers have different sizes to meet your specific needs anytime and anywhere, and they can be stored one inside the other, helping to keep your kitchen tidy and facilitating storage in much less space.

Leakproof: With airtight lids, these containers are 100% leakproof. You can have peace of mind knowing that your soup or Thai green curry will not spill throughout your bag, car seat or on your clothes before tucking in at lunchtime.

Transparent Brilliance: Effortlessly find what you need with our transparent container design. No more rummaging through the fridge or pantry – our clear containers make it easy to identify contents at a glance.

Safe For Microwave, Freezer & Dishwasher: These plastic food containers with lids are suitable for use in the microwave, freezer, and dishwasher (top shelf only). When microwaving, please ensure to remove the lid. Please note: Items will get hot in the microwave—use oven gloves.

Versatile and Multi-Use: From meal prepping to storing leftovers, our meal prep snap-on airtight lid food storage containers are your kitchen’s best friend. These versatile containers are perfect for packing lunches, storing snacks, and keeping your pantry essentials in order.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 Why Choose Containers? 2 Freezer to Dishwasher 3 Stackable & Nestable

specifications_table.Product care instructions: ‎Dishwasher safe. Microwave safe (without lid). Allow items to cool after microwave use. Do not use in oven.
